rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by removing invalid property references and type declarations
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
Align helper declaration types with the expression types
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for declarations
Remove guarantees with unresolved references or invalid types
generic_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
Use assign only for implementation-level bindings of existing output features or auxiliary variables
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers, data types, or property references absent from the analyzed model
Use only visible feature names in assumptions and guarantees
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside annex agree blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Implementation annexes are for implementation-level bindings
Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for assumptions and guarantees
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantees in implementation scope
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers absent from the analyzed model
Do not use invalid or unresolved references in guarantees
